name: post_content
description: Post content to LinkedIn with optional image attachment. Use this to publish new posts to your LinkedIn feed. For scheduling posts for later, use schedule_post instead.

image.description: Optional path to image file to attach to the post

name: get_analytics
description: Get engagement analytics and statistics for your LinkedIn posts. Extracts impressions, engagement rate, profile views, follower growth, and top performing content. Use this to track your LinkedIn performance over time.

days.description: Number of days to look back for analytics (default: 7)

name: generate_ideas
description: Generate LinkedIn content ideas based on trending topics and high-engagement formats. Analyzes trending stories, competitor content, and hashtag performance. For actually posting content, use post_content instead.

topic.description: Topic or industry to generate ideas for (e.g., 'tech', 'leadership', 'startups')

name: engage_feed
description: Engage with posts in your LinkedIn feed by liking and commenting on relevant content. Helps build network connections and improve algorithm visibility. Use this to grow your LinkedIn presence organically.

limit.description: Maximum number of posts to engage with (default: 10)

topic.description: Optional keyword to filter posts for engagement

name: schedule_post
description: Schedule a LinkedIn post to be published at a specific time. Use this for planning content calendar and timing posts for optimal engagement. For immediate posting, use post_content instead.

schedule_time.description: When to publish the post in format 'YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM' (UTC)

image.description: Optional path to image file to attach to the post
